networks.name: Rakuten Advertising / LinkShare
networks.notes: Primary US network; signup via linkshare.com confirmed active

networks.name: Impact.com
networks.notes: Second US network — dual listing confirmed; maximizes publisher reach

networks.name: Webgains
networks.notes: Anker Nordics (program ID 310162); 8–15% commission range by product type and volume

networks.name: Indoleads
networks.notes: CPA network listing confirmed active as of May 2025; added to network map this cycle

commission.type: flat (US/UK/EU); tiered by product type and volume (Nordics)
commission.notes: 8% consistent flat rate on all US transactions. Nordics program offers higher ceiling (up to 15%). SOLIX sub-brand runs a separate program at 5%. All rates confirmed unchanged.

creative_assets.notes: Regularly updated banners and text links; special coupons and seasonal promotions available; dedicated affiliate manager accessible. Data feed enables programmatic/AI placement integrations.

affiliate_program.payment_terms: Standard network payment terms via Rakuten/Impact; no minimum threshold explicitly stated on program page
restrictions: No simulated purchase patterns or scripts

anker_solix.notes: Separate program for Anker's energy/power station sub-brand. Lower commission (5%) reflects higher AOV products ($200–$3,000+).

ankerwork.notes: Workplace/B2B accessories sub-brand; commission rate still unconfirmed — flagged for 3rd consecutive audit cycle; direct email to affiliate@anker.com recommended

anker_referral_program.notes: Consumer-facing referral program distinct from affiliate program. 10% cash to referrer, 10% off to referred friend. Relevant context: higher incentive than affiliate but consumer-only scope.

vs_benchmark.commission: above_median — 8% vs 5% category median; upper-mid vs 12% high
vs_benchmark.network_coverage: strong — now confirmed on 5 networks (Rakuten, Impact, Webgains, CueLinks, Indoleads)

afare_signals.commission_note: 8% significantly above 5% category median; Nordics ceiling of 15% is elite tier for the region.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 30 days at category median. Competitive but not class-leading.
strengths: 8% flat rate well above 5% category median — strong EPC signal
5-network presence (Rakuten + Impact + Webgains + CueLinks + Indoleads) — broadest coverage to date
Dedicated affiliate manager reduces friction for content partners
Self-serve creative library (banners, data feeds, custom links) enables fast activation
Seasonal coupons and promotions = content hooks for review sites and deal publishers
SuperChargers creator program bridges social media and traditional affiliate channels
Brand trust and product quality reduce pre-sale objections; 2% stated conversion rate
Spring/summer promotional cycle (outdoor charging, power banks) at peak window now — April/May prime season
weaknesses: SOLIX sub-brand commission (5%) is lower than main Anker rate — potential affiliate confusion
AnkerWork commission rate still unconfirmed after THREE audit cycles — escalate via email
CueLinks international rate (4.5%) significantly below US rate — channel fragmentation
No publicly stated payment schedule or minimum threshold on program page
Cookie at median — competitors with 45–60 day windows hold edge for considered purchases
opportunities: Spring/summer power bank and outdoor charging season = prime affiliate activation window NOW — April/May
SOLIX high-AOV products ($200–$3K) yield strong EPC at 5%; separate content strategy warranted
Nordics tiered model (8–15%) could be template for US volume-tier program upgrade
AI shopping agent compatibility: data feed availability suits programmatic affiliate placements
Indoleads SEA presence opens Southeast Asian affiliate market — growing region for Anker
Consumer referral program (10%) shows willingness to invest in incentive programs — leverage for affiliate upgrade pitch
threats: Amazon Associates default channel for most Anker buyers — competes with affiliate links on review sites
UGREEN (8–15%) and RAVPower (8–20%) offer comparable or higher ceiling rates
Multiple sub-brand programs risk diluting affiliate attention without unified program messaging
Flat US rate (8%) with no volume tier may not incentivize top publishers vs higher-ceiling alternatives

changes_since_last_audit.changes_detected: Minor addition: Indoleads confirmed as active network listing (first noted this cycle). No rate, cookie, or policy changes. AnkerWork commission rate remains unconfirmed for third consecutive cycle.
notable_observations: Indoleads CPA network listing active since May 2025 — added to network map
Consumer referral program (10% cash / 10% off) documented for first time; distinct from affiliate program
Program page messaging unchanged — '30-day cookies that exceed industry standards' consistent positioning
AnkerWork commission rate still unconfirmed — recommend direct outreach to affiliate@anker.com this cycle
April–May entering prime spring window for power banks/outdoor charging; no new seasonal promotions detected yet but expected

benchmark_update: none — consumer_electronics category benchmarks remain valid; Anker 8% US rate consistent with existing example_programs entry. No new category-level data found warranting benchmark file update.
recommended_actions: URGENT: Email affiliate@anker.com to confirm AnkerWork commission rate — flagged 3 cycles, needs closure
Activate spring affiliate content calendar for Anker power banks / outdoor charging gear — prime window is NOW (April–May)
Document Indoleads as 5th confirmed network — updates Anker's global affiliate footprint score
Build SOLIX-specific content strategy brief for high-AOV portable power affiliate play
Note Anker consumer referral (10%) for comparison to affiliate rate — supports benchmark data for referral vs affiliate program analysis
Cross-reference with Mac Bee ACES signal data on Anker brand visibility to assess full Flywheel composite score
